idea-plugin.name: Windows Themes
idea-plugin.description:
Classic Windows UI themes for JetBrains IDEs.

Included Themes

  • Windows Classic – The Windows 95/NT/2000 look
  • Windows XP

Getting Started

  1. Go to Settings → Appearance & Behavior → Appearance
  2. Select Windows XP or Windows Classic from the Theme dropdown
  3. Click OK

Keywords

Windows XP, Windows 95, Windows 98, Windows 2000, Windows NT, Windows Classic, Theme, Color Scheme, Light Theme
